final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate with GLMCodingPlan in 4 clear steps.

Style/medium: needs a "tech documentation" aesthetic — references in the spirit of GitHub documentation illustrations, Stripe developer guides visual style, 2020s flat infographic design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 4-step vertical flow layout with numbered steps 1-2-3-4 clearly separated
Subject: must include 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: Docker environment setup and Hermes image preparation
  Step 2: Hermes container deployment and configuration
  Step 3: GLMCodingPlan integration setup
  Step 4: Connection verification and testing
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, professional technical documentation atmosphere — exact visual tone is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step numbers "1", "2", "3", "4" with corresponding step titles in Chinese
Constraints: must show 4 distinct steps in clear visual sequence, technical accuracy in Docker/Hermes/GLMCodingPlan context implied
Avoid:
